phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso del Duomo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del DOO-oh-moh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the side entrance, behind the facade.

responses.english: At the side entrance, behind the facade.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, bisogna prenotare per entrare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, bee-SOH-nyah preh-noh-TAH-reh per en-TRAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si compra il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see KOM-prah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Alla biglietteria, o online sul sito.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-lah beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah OH ohn-LEE-neh SOOL SEE-toh
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, or online on the site.

responses.english: At the ticket office, or online on the site.
responses.phonetic: AHL-lah beej-lee-eht-teh-REE-ah OH ohn-LEE-neh SOOL SEE-toh
responses.french: Alla biglietteria, o online sul sito.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un guardaroba disponibile, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon goo-ar-dah-ROH-bah dee-spo-NEE-bee-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is free at the entrance.

responses.english: Yes, it is free at the entrance.
